sources.name: data.police.uk Data Downloads
sources.country_scope: England and Wales; some datasets vary by force and availability
sources.use: Street-level crime, outcomes, stop-and-search bulk CSV; force/LSOA/month coverage.
sources.limitations: Street-level locations are approximate; not all outcome fields are present for all crimes; stop-search availability varies.

sources.name: data.police.uk Street-level Crimes API
sources.use: Point/poly based street-level crime query for validation samples and gap checks.
sources.limitations: Location is approximate; API response can omit outcome_status for some crimes; API should not be used as sole high-volume pipeline if bulk CSV is available.

sources.name: data.police.uk Street-level Outcomes / Outcomes for Crime
sources.use: Outcome severity/clearance context; supports confidence and severity weighting.
sources.limitations: Outcome data can lag and may be missing for some crimes.

sources.name: ONS LSOA December 2021 Boundaries EW
sources.use: Centroid/point-in-polygon spatial match from parcel/UPRN/postcode to LSOA.
sources.limitations: Boundary generalisation level must match intended accuracy; use BFE/BSC appropriately.

sources.name: ONS Postcode Directory
sources.use: Postcode to OA/LSOA/MSOA/admin geographies; fallback bridge where parcel-to-LSOA geometry is weak.
sources.limitations: Postcode centroid/lookup is not a parcel boundary; terminated/current postcode handling required.

sources.name: OS Open UPRN
sources.use: UPRN point locations for addressable properties; helps bridge parcel/property to small-area geography.
sources.limitations: Open UPRN has identifier/geometry but not full address attributes; cannot by itself confirm parcel boundary.

sources.name: HM Land Registry INSPIRE Index Polygons
sources.use: Registered freehold property polygon context; aids parcel-to-title geometry evidence where appropriate.
sources.limitations: Sub-set of registered property; conditions of use apply; polygon is indicative extent, not all land/property coverage.

sources.name: English Indices of Deprivation 2025 — Crime Domain
sources.use: Independent LSOA-level long-term crime/victimisation domain for cross-source agreement and baseline risk calibration.
sources.limitations: Relative deprivation index; snapshot and not real-time police incidents. Use as cross-check, not current incident source.

sources.name: AAYS/Terrayield local parcel data
sources.use: Target parcel geometries/features to receive security score and evidence metadata.
sources.limitations: Depends on source lineage and geometry quality; must be audited separately.
